title: 10 best herbal capsules for gastritis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with gastritis because they contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and heal the stomach lining. The glycyrrhizin present in licorice root has been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms such as heartburn, bloating, and abdominal pain associated with gastritis. Additionally, licorice capsules can help to protect the stomach mucosa from damage caused by stomach acid, promoting a healthy digestive environment and reducing discomfort.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and discomfort in the stomach lining associated with gastritis.
Licoric Acid: As a natural antacid, licoric acid can help neutralize stomach acid and relieve symptoms of heartburn, bloating, and indigestion caused by gastritis.
Isoliquiritigenin: This flavonoid has been shown to have protective effects on the stomach lining, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can exacerbate gastritis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain a high concentration of glycyrrhizin, which helps soothe and calm the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with gastritis.

Barks: The barks of the licorice plant contain a variety of bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing gastric irritation and protecting against stomach ulcers.
remedy_recipe: Measure 100 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root powder and sift it through a fine-mesh sieve to ensure uniformity.
Combine the sifted powder with 200 milliliters of distilled water in a heat-resistant glass bowl and soak for two hours.
Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches a simmer and the liquid has reduced to about 50 milliliters.
Remove from heat and allow to cool before adding 20 gelatin capsules and filling each one with approximately 200 milligrams of the cooled herbal extract.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with gastritis because they contain soothing compounds that calm inflammation and reduce irritation in the digestive tract. The anti-inflammatory properties of chamomile work to ease symptoms such as abdominal pain, bloating, and cramps associated with gastritis. Additionally, chamomile's natural antispasmodic effects help to relax the muscles in the stomach and intestines, reducing spasms and discomfort. As a result, chamomile capsules provide effective relief from gastritis-related discomfort, promoting a sense of calm and digestive well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation and swelling in the stomach lining, which helps to alleviate symptoms of gastritis such as nausea and abdominal pain.
Antacid properties: The soothing and calming effects of chamomile help to neutralize stomach acid and relieve heartburn and indigestion associated with gastritis.
Antioxidant properties: Chamomile's antioxidants help to protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to gastritis symptoms such as pain and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chamomile plant have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe digestive issues associated with gastritis.
Flowers: Chamomile flowers contain apigenin, an flavonoid that has natural anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it effective in alleviating symptoms of gastritis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried chamomile flowers in sufficient quantity for your capsule production needs.
Clean and sift through the dried chamomile flowers to remove any debris or stems.
Use a mortar and pestle to grind the dried chamomile flowers into a fine powder weighing approximately 2500 milligrams.
Fill empty capsules with the powdered chamomile weighing around 500 milligrams per capsule and seal tightly.
Label and store the herbal chamomile capsules in an airtight container for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with gastritis because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which soothe the digestive tract and reduce inflammation in the stomach. The active compound gingerol in ginger capsules has been shown to inhibit the production of prostaglandins, which are hormones that cause pain and swelling in the stomach lining. Additionally, ginger's natural carminative properties help to expel gas and ease bloating, providing relief from gastritis symptoms such as abdominal discomfort and nausea.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms like bloating, cramps, and abdominal pain.

Digestive enzyme stimulation: Herbal ginger capsules contain enzymes that stimulate digestion and improve gut motility, helping to break down food more efficiently and reducing discomfort associated with gastritis.

Antioxidant properties: Ginger's high antioxidant content helps protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate gastritis symptoms like heartburn, nausea, and vomiting.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhizome is the thick, underground stem of the ginger plant, and it is commonly used in medicinal capsules to treat gastritis due to its anti-inflammatory properties.
Roots: The roots of the ginger plant contain bioactive compounds that help alleviate symptoms of gastritis such as inflammation, pain, and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginger root zingiber officinale roots from a trusted supplier or garden.
Wash and peel the ginger roots thoroughly under cold running water for 30 seconds.
Slice the peeled ginger into thin pieces and dry them in a low-temperature oven at 60 degrees celsius for 6 hours.
Combine the dried ginger powder with 500 milligrams of gelatin and mix well in a bowl for 2 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the ginger-gelatin mixture and seal tightly while storing in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with gastritis because they possess anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort. The herbal extract also increases saliva production, which helps to neutralize stomach acid and alleviate heartburn symptoms. Additionally, fennel's carminative properties help to expel gas from the body, alleviating bloating and cramps associated with gastritis. By promoting digestion and relieving symptoms, fennel capsules provide natural relief for individuals suffering from gastritis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Fennel's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and terpenes, help reduce inflammation in the stomach lining, alleviating symptoms of gastritis.

Digestive enzyme stimulation: The volatile oils present in fennel capsules stimulate digestive enzymes, improving digestion and reducing symptoms like bloating, gas, and abdominal pain associated with gastritis.
Antacid properties: Fennel's alkaline nature helps neutralize stomach acid, providing quick relief from heartburn, acidity, and other symptoms of gastritis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in fiber, vitamins, and minerals, fennel roots help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation associated with gastritis.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain antioxidants and volatile oils that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of gastritis such as nausea and bloating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh fennel leaves and stems from a trusted source or purchase dried foeniculum vulgare powder.
Grind 20 grams of dried fennel powder into a fine consistency using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground fennel with 5% gelatin by weight to create a uniform blend in a bowl.
Add 250ml of boiling water to the mixture and stir until the gelatin dissolves completely after 10 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool slightly before filling empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture, aiming for approximately 500mg per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with gastritis because of its potent anti-inflammatory compound, curcumin, which effectively soothes and calms the stomach lining. This natural remedy reduces inflammation and oxidative stress in the digestive system, alleviating symptoms such as heartburn, bloating, and abdominal pain commonly associated with gastritis. Additionally, curcumin's antioxidant properties help protect the stomach lining from damage, promoting a healthy gut environment that facilitates proper digestion and absorption of nutrients.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Turmeric capsules' curcumin content helps reduce inflammation in the stomach lining, which is a primary cause of gastritis symptoms such as pain and discomfort.
Antioxidant Activity: Turmeric's antioxidants neutralize free radicals that can damage stomach tissue and contribute to gastritis, helping to promote healing and protect against further irritation.

Gastroprotective Compounds: Certain compounds in turmeric, such as curcuminoids, have been shown to directly protect the stomach lining from damage caused by acid reflux, ulcers, and other irritants, which can exacerbate gastritis.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: These underground stems contain curcuminoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and protect the stomach lining from gastritis.
Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant contain a high concentration of volatile oils, including turmerone and atlantone, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve digestion.
remedy_recipe: Grind dried turmeric roots into fine powder using mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Mix 500 milligrams of turmeric powder with 100 milliliters of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at low heat for 30 minutes stirring occasionally to create a smooth paste.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with the turmeric paste using a capsule filling machine or spoon and fill manually.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with gastritis because they contain potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe the stomach lining, reducing inflammation and irritation. The capsule's active ingredients, including taraxasterol and sesquiterpenes, have been shown to exhibit gastroprotective properties by inhibiting the production of acid in the stomach and increasing mucus production, which helps to heal and protect the digestive tract. This natural remedy can provide relief from symptoms such as heartburn, bloating, and abdominal pain associated with gastritis.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Dandelion capsules have antioxidant compounds like vitamin C, vitamin E, and beta-carotene that help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the digestive tract, which can contribute to gastritis.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and terpenoids present in dandelion capsules have anti-inflammatory effects that may help alleviate inflammation and irritation in the stomach lining, reducing symptoms of gastritis such as heartburn and bloating.

Bile stimulating properties: Dandelion root extract has been shown to stimulate bile production in the liver, which can help improve digestion and reduce symptoms of gastritis by increasing the breakdown of fats and absorption of nutrients.
remedy_parts: Roots: Dandelion roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues associated with gastritis.
Fruits: Dandelion fruits, also known as seed heads, have been traditionally used to treat digestive disorders including gastritis due to their ability to stimulate digestion and relieve bloating.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots and leaves from pesticide-free areas.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm dry place for 7-10 days.
Grind dried dandelion roots and leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 20 grams of ground dandelion with 100ml of vegetable oil and let it steep for 2 hours at room temperature.
Fill empty capsules with the infused oil mixture and store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with gastritis because they provide relief from inflammation, pain, and discomfort in the stomach lining. The mucilage present in marshmallows forms a protective barrier that soothes and heals irritated tissues, reducing symptoms of gastritis such as nausea, vomiting, and heartburn. Additionally, marshmallow capsules may help to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation, promoting a healthy gut environment and alleviating discomfort associated with gastritis.
remedy_properties: Mucilage content: Marshmallow capsules contain a thick, protective mucilage that helps to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with gastritis.

Anti-inflammatory activity: The herbs used to make marshmallow capsules, such as Althaea officinalis, have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and pain in the stomach lining, alleviating symptoms of gastritis.

Soothing demulcent action: Marshmallow capsules act as a demulcent, forming a protective barrier on the mucous membranes that helps to calm inflammation, irritation, and discomfort associated with gastritis, allowing for faster healing.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps soothe and protect the stomach lining, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with gastritis.
Rhyzomes: Containing anti-inflammatory compounds like althaeic acid, they help reduce inflammation and promote healing of gastrointestinal tissues affected by gastritis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest althaea officinalis roots in early spring or late summer, ensuring freshness and potency for optimal benefits.
Dry the harvested roots using a food dehydrator on low temperature setting for 6-8 hours to preserve delicate compounds.
Grind dried althaea officinalis roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to ensure uniform consistency.
Mix one part powdered althaea officinalis root with two parts gelatin capsule filler and fill capsules using a capsule filling machine or spoon.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months, shaking gently before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with gastritis because they contain menthol, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. When taken orally, menthol coats the lining of the stomach and esophagus, reducing inflammation and soothing irritations caused by gastritis. Additionally, peppermint's calming effects on the digestive tract help to relax the muscles in the stomach, allowing food to pass more easily and alleviating symptoms such as nausea and bloating. This natural remedy provides effective relief from gastritis symptoms without harsh medications.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Peppermint oil has been shown to reduce inflammation in the gut, which can help alleviate symptoms of gastritis such as stomach pain and discomfort.

Gastroprotective properties: The menthol content in peppermint oil helps protect the stomach lining from damage caused by acid reflux and other irritants, reducing the risk of further irritation and inflammation.

Spasmolytic properties: Peppermint oil has been found to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, which can help ease symptoms such as abdominal cramping, nausea, and vomiting that are common with gastritis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, peppermint roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe digestive issues associated with gastritis.
Rhyzomes: The underground stems of peppermint, also known as rhyzomes, contain volatile oils that ease stomach discomfort and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 cups of fresh peppermint leaves mentha x piperita from your garden or store.
Dry the peppermint leaves in a warm dark place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Blend 1 cup of dried peppermint leaves with 200g of silica gel in a food processor until well combined.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with a mixture of 250mg of blended peppermint mixture and 50mg of potato starch.
Store the filled herbal peppermint capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damask rose capsules helps with gastritis because they contain bioactive compounds that soothe the digestive tract and reduce inflammation. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help to calm irritated stomach lining, reducing pain and discomfort associated with gastritis. Additionally, damask rose has been traditionally used to treat various gastrointestinal issues, including acidity, bloating, and nausea, making it a natural and effective remedy for managing gastritis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Damask rose capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids, anthocyanins, and quercetin, which help reduce inflammation in the stomach lining, alleviating symptoms of gastritis such as pain and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in damask rose capsules neutralize free radicals that can damage stomach tissues, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healing of gastric ulcers and erosion caused by gastritis.

Gastroprotective agents: Damask rose capsules contain bioactive compounds like gallic acid, which have been shown to protect the stomach lining from acid and pepsin-induced damage, thereby preventing further inflammation and tissue destruction in patients with gastritis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the damask rose plant contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with gastritis.
Seeds: Damask rose seeds have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including gastritis, due to their ability to soothe and calm the stomach lining.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried damask rose petals and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Combine one teaspoon of the ground damask rose powder with three tablespoons of glycerin in a small bowl.
Add enough distilled water to create a paste, stirring well for about 10 minutes or until a smooth consistency is achieved.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately half a gram of the damask rose paste and seal tightly.
Store the finished herbal capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle capsules helps with gastritis because they contain silymarin, a potent flavonoid that protects and regenerates liver cells. By doing so, it reduces inflammation and irritation in the stomach lining, alleviating symptoms such as nausea, bloating, and abdominal pain. Silymarin also enhances gut motility, promoting the natural elimination of toxins and waste products from the body, thereby reducing discomfort and improving overall digestion. This natural approach can provide relief for individuals suffering from gastritis without resorting to harsh medications.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Silymarin is a flavonoid compound that has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which helps to reduce inflammation and protect the stomach lining from damage caused by gastritis.

Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in milk thistle have been shown to have gastroprotective properties, including reducing gastric acid production and improving mucosal integrity, thereby helping to soothe and heal the stomach lining affected by gastritis.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in milk thistle capsules have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of bacteria that may contribute to gastritis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silymarin, a potent antioxidant that helps protect the stomach lining from damage and reduces inflammation.
Seeds: Contain flavonoids and lignans that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in soothing digestive issues.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 cups of fresh or dried silybum marianum leaves and seeds from a trusted source.
Clean the herbs by removing stems and flowers, then chop them into small pieces with scissors.
Combine 500 grams of chopped herbs with 1000 ml of water in a large saucepan, simmer for 30 minutes, then strain.
Dry the extracted herb mixture using a dehydrator at 50°c for 2 hours or air-drying it for several days.
Fill #00 gelatin capsules with 500 mg each of dried silybum marianum extract and seal immediately to prevent exposure.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for gastritis are a natural alternative to conventional treatments, providing relief from digestive discomforts caused by inflammation in the stomach lining. These capsules contain a blend of herbs such as slippery elm, marshmallow root, and licorice root that soothe and protect the mucous membranes, reducing acid reflux and abdominal pain. For instance, products like Gastrilax and Gastro-Plus have helped many individuals alleviate symptoms, allowing them to enjoy their favorite foods without discomfort and improving overall quality of life.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat gastritis with herbal capsules is to look for a product that contains a combination of herbs such as Aloe vera, Marshmallow root, and Slippery elm. These ingredients help soothe the stomach lining, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. Take two capsules three times a day with water before meals to alleviate symptoms like heartburn, nausea, and abdominal pain. Consistency is key, so be sure to take the herbal capsules regularly for optimal results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to gastritis that are treated with herbal capsules are digestive issues such as ulcers, inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Herbal capsules containing extracts from plants like turmeric, ginger, and slippery elm may help alleviate symptoms like abdominal pain, bloating, and inflammation. Other conditions, including acid reflux, stomach cramps, and diarrhea, can also be managed with herbal supplements, providing a natural alternative to pharmaceutical treatments.
